- Backlog Item ID: BI-260015
- Title: Formalize frontend architecture baseline
- Persona/Actor: Frontend implementation team and domain operators
- Value statement: For implementation quality and long-term maintainability, establish explicit architecture and contract-governance rules before stack-specific implementation accelerates.
- Context: Frontend architecture decision phase for G1-G5.
- Problem statement: Without explicit architecture and contract rules, feature growth can cause unstable interfaces, state sprawl, and fragile integration behavior.
- Expected outcome: Team can implement MVP with consistent module boundaries, state strategy, rendering model, and contract protection workflow.
- Success metric(s):
  - G1-G5 are accepted and encoded in formal artifacts.
  - FR/OR/CR requirements cover architecture behavior, contract operations, and constraints.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - ADR-260018 is created and accepted.
  - REQ-FR-260015, REQ-FR-260016, REQ-OR-260003, and REQ-CR-260007 are created and linked.
  - Product backlog and backlog status include BI-260015 with traceability.
- Non-goals: Micro-frontend split, SSR-first workspace rendering, and unmanaged feature-internal coupling.
- Constraints: Preserve accepted C-F decisions on workspace model, information architecture, and search/interaction semantics.
- Dependencies: Accepted A-F decisions, GraphQL backend contract decisions.
- Risks/assumptions:
  - Risk: insufficient enforcement tooling may allow boundary drift.
  - Risk: contract-test coverage gaps can hide breaking changes.
  - Assumption: feature-sliced architecture remains adequate through MVP scale.
- Validation approach: Architecture checks, dependency-rule checks, contract-test checks, and release-gate verification.
- Priority score: 91
- Target window: MVP foundation
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: REQ-FR-260015.md, REQ-FR-260016.md, REQ-OR-260003.md, REQ-CR-260007.md
  - ADR: ADR-260018.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - Changeset: n/a
